evidence.source_title: Iran regime establishes anti-PMOI (MEK) 'intelligence station' in Albania
evidence.description: Roudaki replaced Zandi Aliabadi as MOIS station chief in Albania at the end of 2017, inheriting the intelligence network Zandi had built.

editorial_notes: Zandi preceded Roudaki as MOIS station chief in Tirana. Handover at end of 2017.
